titleEn: If food security is strategic, why does agricultural innovation still struggle to scale?
titleZh: 粮食安全是战略要务，为何农业创新仍难规模化？
summaryZh: 本文探讨了农业技术创新规模化面临的困境。尽管粮食安全具有战略意义，但农业长期依赖从其他行业（如GPS、传感器、AI）引进技术。如今，农业正成为技术的试验场，这些技术最终却在建筑、采矿甚至国防领域找到更大市场。文章以Monarch Tractor为例，暗示农业创新投资回报周期长、市场碎片化等问题，呼吁行业反思如何突破规模化瓶颈。
featuredReason: 本文从宏观视角揭示了农业（包括智慧畜牧）创新难以规模化的深层原因，有助于从业者理解行业生态瓶颈，并思考如何借鉴跨领域技术转化经验。
contentFull: If food security is strategic, why does agricultural innovation still struggle to scale? 15-06 | Tech in focus | Expert opinionLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint Geert Hekkert Chief editor of Future FarmingPhoto: AI-generatedFor decades, agriculture has benefited from technologies developed elsewhere. GPS came from defense. Sensors and cameras originated in the automotive industry. Artificial intelligence emerged from Silicon Valley.But something interesting is happening. Increasingly, agriculture itself is becoming the proving ground for technologies that eventually find their largest markets elsewhere—in construction, mining and, increasingly, defense.No longer a theoretical discussionTake Monarch Tractor. AfterLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintMore aboutagtech investmentsartificial intelligenceautonomous technologyelectric tractorssustainabilityadLEARN MORERelated articles15-07 | NewsNorwegian robotics firm AutoAgri rebrands as Uncrew Robotics14-07 | NewsSabanto secures oversubscribed funding round, betting on smaller platforms10-07 | NewsXAG launches RM80 unmanned mower, unveils new X Series drone system02-07 | NewsTersus GNSS AG993: Modular autosteer kit with built-in satellite correction fallback Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
几十年来，农业一直受益于其他领域开发的技术。GPS来自国防领域。传感器和摄像头源自汽车工业。人工智能则诞生于硅谷。

但有趣的事情正在发生。农业本身正日益成为技术的试验场，而这些技术最终将在其他领域——建筑、采矿，以及日益增长的国防领域——找到最大的市场。

**不再只是理论探讨**
以Monarch Tractor为例。
author: Geert Hekkert
contentHtml: For decades, agriculture has benefited from technologies developed elsewhere. GPS came from defense. Sensors and cameras originated in the automotive industry. Artificial intelligence emerged from Silicon Valley.
